stemHtml: A pilot accustomed to landing on a wide runway may find, when approaching to a narrow runway, that he/she is at a…

options.a: lower height than he/she actually is, with the tendency to overshoot.
options.b: lower height and the impression of landing slow.
options.c: greater height and the impression of landing short.
options.d: greater height than he/she actually is, with the tendency to land short.
